research_question: How does Bayesian estimation compare to frequentist estimation for structural equation models (SEM) in small sample contexts?

population.name: Population (Study Context)
include: studies addressing small sample contexts in SEM (no fixed numeric threshold required)
simulation studies and empirical comparisons of estimation methods
exclude: studies on other multivariate methods (e.g., HLM, MANOVA) without SEM
large-sample-only studies (n > 1000 without small sample conditions)

study_design_exclude: theoretical/conceptual papers without simulation or empirical data
